generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people worry about civil defense spending, but let's be real - we've seen what happens when we're unprepared. My sister in Portland had to evacuate last year with zero warning. The system failed her. We can't afford to cut preparedness when threats are only getting more unpredictable. #SafetyFirst #PreparedNotScared
